IDirectMusicPerformance8

The IDirectMusicPerformance8 interface is the overall manager of music playback. It is used for playing segments, dispatching messages, requesting and receiving event notification, and setting and retrieving music parameters.

If a title needs two complete sets of music playing at the same time, it can create more than one performance. Separate performances obey separate tempo maps, and so play completely asynchronously, whereas all segments within one performance play in lock step.

The methods of IDirectMusicPerformance8 can be organized into the following groups:

Audiopath CreateAudioPath
  CreateStandardAudioPath
  GetDefaultAudioPath
  SetDefaultAudioPath
Messages AllocPMsg
  ClonePMsg
  FreePMsg
  SendPMsg
Notification AddNotificationType
  GetNotificationPMsg
  RemoveNotificationType
Parameters GetGlobalParam
  GetParamEx
  SetGlobalParam
Playback GetSegmentState
  IsPlaying
  PlaySegmentEx
  StopEx
Timing GetTime
  MusicToReferenceTime
  ReferenceToMusicTime
Miscellaneous CloseDown
  InitAudioX
  Invalidate

The IDirectMusicPerformance8 interface also supports the AddRef and Release methods. There is also minimal support for the QueryInterface method.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in Dmusici.h.
